---
title: "Predicting whale density from eDNA: full analysis"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Predicting whale density from eDNA: full analysis}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

> **This vignette is a stub.** It covers all three eDNA markers (16S, 18SV4,
> 18SV9) and three whale species (blue, fin, humpback), reproducing the nine
> (marker × species) model combinations from the paper.
>
> **Requires:** processed data files in `data/` — run `source("analysis/setup-data.R")`
> first. Stability selection and nested validation results are loaded from
> `rslt/` rather than recomputed (full computation: ~3 hours per marker via
> `analysis/run-all.R`).

## Overview

*TODO: describe the full analysis structure — three markers, three species,
stability selection → nested validation → model fitting pipeline*

## Data preparation

*TODO: load and describe ncog16s.RData, ncog18sv4.RData, ncog18sv9.RData,
density-estimates.RData; show sample counts and feature space dimensions*

## Stability selection

*TODO: describe the sPLS stability selection procedure and hyperparameter grid;
load and summarize rslt/stability-selection/*/stable-sets.rds*

## Nested validation

*TODO: describe the nested CV procedure; load and summarize
rslt/nested-validation/*/validation-stable-sets.rds*

## Model fitting

*TODO: load rslt/models/fitted-models-*.RData; show adjusted R² and RMSE
across all nine combinations*

## Comparison with naive baselines

*TODO: load rslt/models/naive-preds.rds; compare eDNA predictions to lag and
seasonal-mean baselines*
